name: QA 832
description:
PCP QA Test No. 832

Exercise enforced-authentication modes for pmcd.



Copyright (c) 2013,2017 Red Hat.



**To reproduce this test, please run:**

    build/ci/ci-run.py ubuntu2204 reproduce

testStage.description:
PCP QA Test No. 832

Exercise enforced-authentication modes for pmcd.



Copyright (c) 2013,2017 Red Hat.



**To reproduce this test, please run:**

    build/ci/ci-run.py ubuntu2204 reproduce
